subcodes.first_line: O Thou the Most Glorious, O Sun of Truth in the Most Exalted Concourse, O Most Great Luminary of the Kingdom of the Hidden Mystery, these Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهاء ابهی ای شمس حقیقت ملا اعلی ای نیر اعظم ملکوت غیب اخفی این بندگان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for service, @Manifestation of God as sun
